    Our Premium Services

    Services to give you success

    Expert Facebook & Instagram advertising solutions. From strategy to optimization, we deliver results.

    Why MPG Solution

    Built for Nepali brands that want real results

    Performance-Focused

    Every rupee spent is tied to a measurable outcome — leads, sales, or messages.

    Nepal Market Expertise

    We understand local buying behavior, language nuances and what converts here.

    Strategy + Creative + Optimization

    One team handles the funnel, the ad creative, and daily campaign tuning.

    Transparent Reporting

    Weekly performance updates and a client portal — no jargon, no hidden numbers.

    How we work

    A simple 5-step process

    1. 1
      Step 1

      Discover

      Audit your business, audience and current ads.

    2. 2
      Step 2

      Strategy

      Build a funnel, offer and creative plan that fits.

    3. 3
      Step 3

      Launch

      Set up campaigns, pixels and tracking properly.

    4. 4
      Step 4

      Optimize

      Daily monitoring, creative tests and budget tuning.

    5. 5
      Step 5

      Scale

      Push winning ads harder and unlock new audiences.
